name: Zhejiang Runtu Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Runtu Co., Ltd. produces and sells dyes in China. It provides approximately 300 types of chemicals in dye, pigment, and additive categories. The company offers disperse, reactive, direct, blend, cationic, and vat dyes; and chemical intermediate products, textile auxiliaries, sodium hydrosulfite, sulfuric acid, and chlorinate alkali. It provides its products under the RUNTU, LONGYU, DRAGONPERS, RUIHUAZOL, and JIACHEN brand names. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Shangyu, China.
